title: Papertek Framework for Education Grammar Data Schema
description: JSON Schema for grammar module data files in the Papertek Framework for Education. Defines the structure of grammar content organized by lesson with support for multiple grammar module types.

additionalProperties.description: Array of grammar modules for a specific lesson (keyed by lesson ID, e.g., '1-1')

heading.title: Title/Heading Module
heading.description: A section heading or title within the grammar content

level.description: Heading level (3 for h3, 4 for h4, etc.)

text.description: The heading text, may contain HTML markup
Explanation text, may contain HTML, grammar-term spans, or word-lookup spans

pronoun-grid.title: Pronoun/Vocabulary Grid Module
pronoun-grid.description: Grid display for pronouns, vocabulary, or comparable items with translation and optional notes

columns.description: Number of columns in the grid

target.description: Target language content (German in current implementation)

native.description: Native language content (Norwegian in current implementation). In framework version, will be abstracted to 'native' field.

note.description: Optional note or annotation (e.g., formal vs. informal)

rule-table.title: Grammar Rule Table Module
rule-table.description: Tabular presentation of grammar rules with headers and rows

rows.description: Table rows, each row is an array of cells matching header count

list.title: List Module
list.description: Bulleted or numbered list of points

info-box.title: Information Box Module
info-box.description: Highlighted information or tip box with title and content

boxType.description: Type of information box (remember=remember, tips=tips, warning=warning, info=info). Determines visual styling.

content.description: Box content, may contain HTML markup

eksempel.title: Example Sentences Module
eksempel.description: Example sentences showing target language with native translation, displayed in a grid layout

title.description: Optional title for the example section

columns.description: Number of columns in the grid layout (default: 1)

target.description: Sentence in the target language, may contain HTML markup
